title: Schnitzel Chicken Skewers
description: A German-inspired dish of marinated chicken cooked on skewers and served with a side of tangy sauce.
instructions: 1. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
2. In a small bowl, mix together the olive oil, salt, and pepper.
3. Cut the chicken breast into 1-inch cubes and thread them onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
4. Brush the chicken with the olive oil mixture and season with salt and pepper.
5. Grill the chicken skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are cooked through.
6. While the chicken is cooking, mix together the velvety barbecue sauce and brazilian chimichurri (if using) in a small bowl.
7. Once the chicken is cooked, brush it with the barbecue sauce mixture and grill for an additional 1-2 minutes.
8. Serve the chicken skewers hot, garnished with floral honey (if using).
